name: St. Croix National Golf & Event Center LLC
about: St. Croix National Golf & Event Center is a premier golf destination offering both an 18-hole course and indoor facilities. The venue features four HD Golf simulators for year-round play, complemented by a Pelz-designed 18-hole putting course for short game practice. On-site amenities include The Grounds restaurant, a pro shop, and a fitness center with bioDensity and Power Plate equipment. The facility hosts tournaments, leagues, and private events, catering to golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Four indoor HD Golf simulators ensure playable conditions regardless of weather
Pelz-designed putting course with synthetic greens for dedicated short game practice
Full-service clubhouse with restaurant, pro shop, and fitness facilities
Hosts leagues and tournaments, creating a competitive and social environment

food_and_drink.notes: The Grounds restaurant is available for dining
Food and drinks can be brought directly to simulator bays

simulator_hardware.notes: Four indoor HD Golf simulators mentioned

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state if clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, food and drinks can be brought straight to your simulator bay.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: We recommend reserving 1 hour per golfer to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue was voted 'Second Best for Family Activities' in the valley.
